spec_match.rationale: Correctly probes navigator.gpu.wgslLanguageFeatures.has('buffer_view') — the exact WGSL extension gate from the proposal.

interactive.rationale: Button triggers real probe; status region reports result with clear fallback messaging for unsupported browsers.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Promises exact WGSL extension names with clear fallback; delivers exactly that.

edge_cases.rationale: Handles unsupported gracefully but doesn't test what happens when navigator.gpu itself is unavailable.

references.rationale: Links to chromestatus.com/feature/5094091886034944 and the gpuweb proposal.

runtime_evidence.rationale: Browser-tested: probed wgslLanguageFeatures, got 'buffer_view is not exposed in this browser yet'. Clean fallback, no console errors.

openQuestions.title: Add WebGPU-unavailable fallback path
openQuestions.detail: The probe assumes navigator.gpu exists. A follow-up should handle browsers without WebGPU entirely.
